PUPPET_FILE
  Puppet: INCLUDE_CLASS_EXPRESSION
    PsiElement(CLASS)('class')
    PsiPuppetResourceLikeClassDeclarationBlockImpl(RESOURCE_LIKE_CLASS_DECLARATION_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetResourceLikeClassDescriptionImpl(RESOURCE_LIKE_CLASS_DESCRIPTION)
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''simplename'')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('param')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
              PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('123')
      PsiElement(;)(';')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetResourceLikeClassDescriptionImpl(RESOURCE_LIKE_CLASS_DESCRIPTION)
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('varname')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('param')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
              PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('123')
      PsiElement(;)(';')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetResourceLikeClassDescriptionImpl(RESOURCE_LIKE_CLASS_DESCRIPTION)
        PsiPuppetArrayImpl(ARRAY)
          PsiElement(LIST_START[)('[')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''simplename'')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('varname')
          PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('param')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
              PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('123')
      PsiElement(;)(';')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
